description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a light gray wood grain finish, featuring clean, modern lines and a minimalist design. The cabinet appears to have two main vertical compartments, each with a subtle seam indicating the presence of doors or drawers. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. Handles are minimally visible, likely integrated into the edge of the doors for a sleek appearance. The cabinet stands on a flat base, with no visible legs or wheels, suggesting stability. Its overall appearance is utilitarian, suitable for storing documents or office supplies in an organized manner.
description: A tall, light gray wood grain filing cabinet with two vertical compartments and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: The cabinet is seen from an angle showing the front and right side, with a visible seam and a slightly protruding door.
description_view_1: This view shows the back and left side, with a continuous wood grain surface and no visible handles or seams.
description_view_2: The left side and partial front are visible, highlighting the flat, uninterrupted wood grain and a subtle seam near the top.
description_view_3: The rear and right side are shown, with a clean, flat surface and the edge of the door visible.
